heading: Additional authority of the Administrator
label: 3844 Additional authority of the Administrator
text: The Administrator, in consultation with the Secretary, may establish, as necessary, terms and conditions regarding the removal and disposal of antifouling systems prohibited or restricted under this chapter.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title X of , , , which enacted this chapter and repealed chapter 37 (§ 2401 et seq.) of this title. For complete classification of title X to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 111–281124 Stat. 3023Oct. 15, 2010
